transcript: Speaker A: काय करत आहात? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: I'm adding oil. Speaker A: ते "I'm applying oil" किंवा "I'm oiling my hair" असं म्हणायला हवं. इंग्लिश शिकायचं आहे का? [You should say "I'm applying oil" or "I'm oiling my hair". Do you want to learn English?] Speaker B: हो, पण पैसे नाहीत ना. [Yes, but I don't have money.] Speaker A: फक्त १ रुपये असले तरी पुरे. AI सोबत इंग्लिश शिकायला सुरुवात करता येईल. [Even 1 rupee is enough. You can start learning English with AI.] Speaker B: कसं काय? [How?] Speaker A: MySivi वर AI teacher सोबत रोज बोला. ते तुम्हाला कसं बरोबर बोलायचं ते शिकवेल. [Speak daily with the AI teacher on MySivi. It will teach you how to speak correctly.] Speaker B: चांगलं होईल का? [Will it be good?] Speaker A: Tuition, coaching पेक्षा खूप जास्त effective होईल कारण ते तुमच्या level नुसार guide करेल. [It will be much more effective than tuition or coaching because it will guide you according to your level.] Speaker B: एवढं सगळं फक्त १ रुपयात? [All this for just 1 rupee?] Speaker A: हो, पहिले ३ दिवस फक्त १ रुपये. आवडलं तर trial ३ दिवसांनंतर २९९ रुपयांत continue करता येईल. तर आत्ताच MySivi install करा आणि practice सुरू करा. [Yes, first 3 days for just 1 rupee. If you like it, you can continue the trial after 3 days for 299 rupees. So install MySivi now and start practicing.]

summary: An AI avatar corrects a woman's English grammar in a split-screen format to demonstrate the MySivi app. The ad promotes learning English with an AI teacher for just 1 rupee for the first 3 days, offering a personalized and affordable alternative to traditional coaching. It ends with a call to action to download the app.
